name: Sausage Brunch Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the casserole evening before.
2. Cook sausage and drain thoroughly on paper towels.
3. Beat the eggs and evaporated milk slightly.
4. Add sausage, cubed bread, and cheddar cheese.
5. Pour into a 9 x 9-inch casserole.
6. Cover with foil and refrigerate overnight.
7. Bake uncovered for 45 minutes or until firm in a preheated 350 degree oven.
8. Onions, green peppers, and mushrooms can also be added.
